---
title: "MLSYSIM Research Paper"
subtitle: "Machine Learning Systems Infrastructure Modeling: A First-Principles Analytical Framework"
---

<object data="mlsysim-paper.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">
  <p>Your browser does not support embedded PDFs.
  <a href="mlsysim-paper.pdf">Download the paper (PDF)</a>.</p>
</object>

::: {.callout-tip}
## Download
[**Download Paper (PDF)**](mlsysim-paper.pdf){.im-btn .im-btn-primary}
:::
